do_not_claim_now: theorem-grade A_ch on the live charged theorem lane
theorem-grade mu_phys(Y_e) on the live charged theorem lane
notes: This closes the exact same-family affine coordinate on the target-anchored charged witness.
It does not promote the theorem-grade charged absolute lane, which remains behind C_hat_e^{cand} promotion and the descended scalar mu_phys(Y_e).
theorem_statement: On the fixed exact same-family charged witness, the unique affine coordinate is A_ch^(cf) = (1/3) log det(Y_e^(cf)) = mean(log m_i). Equivalently g_e^(cf) = exp(A_ch^(cf)), and the exact charged triple is recovered by m_i = exp(A_ch^(cf) + ell_i^ctr) from the centered log shape.
